fields.summary: Update the RM webapp host that is reported as part of Federation membership to current primary RM's IP
Enable YARN RM scale out via federation using multiple RM's

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description:
Currently when RM HA is enabled, the webapp host is randomly picked from one of the ensemble RMs and relies on redirect to pick the active primary RM. This has a few shortcomings:
  * There's an overhead of additional network hop.
  * Sometimes the rmId selected might be an instance which is inactive/decommissioned
  * In few of our clusters, we have redirects disabled (either in client or server side) and then the invocation fails.

This JIRA proposes updating the RM webapp host that is reported as part of Federation membership to the current primary RM's IP.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

comments.body: Attaching a simple patch that updates the RM webapp host that is reported as part of Federation membership to the current primary RM's IP.

Thanks [~curino] for the quick review. And good point on testing (missed mentioning it), [~giovanni.fumarola] did test the patch.

I'll wait for Yetus and commit if I get an all clear.
cancelling and resubmitting to kick jenkins
